infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Vibyra connects to the desktop app on your local Wi-Fi network.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Vibyra lets you take photos to add context to chat and project publishing.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Vibyra lets you choose images for chat, your profile picture, and project publishing.
